Square Root

Instruction Type and Width         Instruction description
                                   Performs reciprocal square root on a source and multiplied by
                                    y                  y
                                   2 . The numerator 2 is determined by the 16-bit source value.
Vector Reciprocal Square Root
                                   The source is unsigned number varies from zero to 65535. The
                                   destination is signed positive 16-bit wide.
                                   Performs square-root on a source. The source is unsigned 16-bit
Vector Square Root                 number varies from zero to 65535. The destination is positive
                                   signed 16-bit number.
                                   Produces a square root of the source. The second source is a
                                   16-bit signed exponent value. The destination is unsigned 16-bit
Vector Square Root With Exponent
                                   number represented as U(16,8) where the 8 MSBs are the integer
                                   part of the root and the 8 LSBs are the fraction part of the root.
